blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 186 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
